description: Address v1 review feedback: fix sensitive field exposure in UserRepository, add behavioral tests, add missing FK relations on Match/Swipe/CommunityMember, fix CI build script, fix SECURITY.md accuracy, remove unused cursor field, add ESLint to lint-staged.
steps: Add UserPublicFields select const to user.repository.ts and use it in findMany. Add findByIdWithPassword for auth flows.
Add behavioral tests for key repository methods (findById args, findMany pagination, softDelete, updateLastLogin, findByConversation, markAllAsRead, withTx return value).
Add @relation directives to Match (user1, user2 -> User) and Swipe (swiper, target -> User) in schema.prisma. Add corresponding relation arrays on User model.
Add user User @relation(...) to CommunityMember and communityMemberships CommunityMember[] on User (disambiguate from conversations relation).
Change packages/database/package.json build script to attempt prisma generate with fallback.
Fix SECURITY.md to remove Trivy claim and replace with accurate statements.
Remove cursor?: string from PaginationOptions in base.repository.ts.
Update .lintstagedrc.json to also run ESLint on packages/database ts files.
acceptance_criteria: UserRepository.findMany returns data without passwordHash/twoFactorSecret fields
UserRepository.findByIdWithPassword method exists for auth flows
Behavioral tests verify prisma call arguments for at least 7 methods
Match model has @relation to User in schema.prisma
Swipe model has @relation to User in schema.prisma
CommunityMember has User relation in schema.prisma
packages/database/package.json build script tries prisma generate
PaginationOptions no longer has cursor field
.lintstagedrc.json runs ESLint on database package ts files
findings: 1. The prisma generate in the build script correctly fails with a 403 from binaries.prisma.sh in this environment but the || echo fallback handles it gracefully (exit 0). 2. turbo test depends on ^build, so running full pnpm turbo test triggers the prisma generate network timeout. Filtered test (pnpm --filter @quant/database test) runs in under 1s. 3. lint-staged with eslint --fix runs successfully on pre-commit for packages/database/src/**/*.ts files. 4. Total test count went from 36 to 42 (added 6 behavioral tests).
